stories.title: Thunder take series lead over Spurs in San Antonio...
NASCAR's O'Donnell: Busch 'an American badass'
stories.summary: NASCAR CEO Steve O'Donnell talked at length about Kyle Busch's legacy, his rebelliousness and even his feuds with the organization Friday.

stories.title: RCR retiring Busch's 8 car until son can take over...
stories.summary: Richard Childress Racing is temporarily retiring Kyle Busch's No. 8 Cup Series car until the late driver's 11-year-old son Brexton is ready to take over behind the wheel.

stories.title: Manzardo's pinch-hit HR saves Williams' 11-K gem
stories.summary: Gavin Williams matched Phillies ace Cristopher Sanchez with eight scoreless innings before Kyle Manzardo delivered a pinch-hit homer in the ninth inning to lift the Guardians to a 1-0 victory.

stories.title: Yanks' Cole tosses 6 scoreless after 569-day layof...
stories.summary: Yankees ace Gerrit Cole pitched six shutout innings Friday night in his return from elbow ligament reconstruction that caused a 569-day absence.
